classes.reasoning: Document is explicitly titled 'eCRF MODULE' with structured data capture fields for lipid panel results, hepatic safety labs, and injection site assessments organized by study visit and patient identifiers. Contains typical case report form elements including checkboxes, result fields, and units of measure.

intervention: PCSK9-related treatment (injectable, based on PCSK9 measurement field and injection site assessment)
summary: This is a Case Report Form module for capturing lipid panel laboratory results, hepatic safety monitoring data, and injection site assessments across multiple study visits. The form is designed for per-patient data collection in a cardiovascular/lipid study and includes enhanced hepatic monitoring requirements introduced in Protocol Amendment 1.
content:
# eCRF MODULE — LIPID PANEL & CARDIOVASCULAR ASSESSMENTS
## Study: BIORCE-CAR-2024-007 | Form Version: 2.0
## Site ID: ______ | Patient Code: CRD883-___-____
## Visit: [ ] Baseline  [ ] Wk4  [ ] Wk8  [ ] Wk12  [ ] Wk24  [ ] Wk52  [ ] EOT
## Lab Draw Date: __ / __ / ______  Fasting? [ ] Yes (>=9h)  [ ] No — reason:

## PRIMARY LIPID PANEL

| Parameter | Result | Unit | % Change from Baseline |
|---|---|---|---|
| LDL-C | | mmol/L | |
| Total Cholesterol | | mmol/L | |
| HDL-C | | mmol/L | |
| Triglycerides | | mmol/L | |
| Non-HDL-C (auto-calc) | | mmol/L | |
| ApoB | | g/L | |
| Lp(a) | | nmol/L | |
| PCSK9 (if measured) | | ng/mL | |

**LDL-C method:** [ ] Friedewald  [ ] Direct measurement  [ ] Martin-Hopkins

## HEPATIC SAFETY PANEL (per Amendment 1 enhanced monitoring)

| Test | Result | Unit | xULN | Flag |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ALT | | U/L | | [ ] <1x  [ ] 1-3x  [ ] 3-5x  [ ] >5x |
| AST | | U/L | | [ ] <1x  [ ] 1-3x  [ ] 3-5x  [ ] >5x |
| Total Bilirubin | | µmol/L | | [ ] Normal  [ ] Elevated |
| Alkaline Phosphatase | | U/L | | [ ] Normal  [ ] Elevated |

**If ALT >5x ULN:** [ ] Drug held  [ ] Sponsor Medical Monitor notified
(date: __ / __ / ______) — *Required per Amendment 1*

## INJECTION SITE ASSESSMENT

**Injection site reaction present?** [ ] No  [ ] Yes

If yes:
| Feature | Assessment |
|---|---|
| Site | [ ] Abdomen  [ ] Thigh  [ ] Upper arm |
| Redness | [ ] Absent  [ ] Mild  [ ] Moderate  [ ] Severe |
| Swelling | [ ] Absent  [ ] Mild (<2.5cm)  [ ] Moderate  [ ] Severe (>5cm) |
| Pain (0-10 NRS) | Score: _____ |
| Duration | [ ] <24h  [ ] 1-3 days  [ ] >3 days |

**Document as AE?** [ ] Yes (complete AE module)  [ ] No
